title: Liquami e digestati microfiltrati utili e convenienti per fertirrigare
description: A technical report on the use of microfiltered livestock and biogas plant digestate as fertigation inputs to enhance nutrient use efficiency and support circularity in agricultural systems. It presents a field trial in Codigoro (Ferrara), comparing microfiltered digestate fertigation to conventional urea application on maize, including agronomic performance and environmental impact assessments.
